plan.title: Fix FP16-to-FP32 Dequantization Bug in GGUFParser Metal Backend

model.problem: All dequantize functions use reinterpret_cast<const float*>(&scale_u16) — reads 4 bytes from 2-byte variable (UB), producing garbage weights
model.user: SmartHaus platform — native GGUF inference on Apple Silicon
success: Basic quant formats produce correct FP32 from known FP16 scale inputs
K-quant formats use correct block structures per GGUF spec
Unit test validates Q4_0 dequantization against reference values

phases.task: Fix basic quant functions (Q4_0, Q4_1, Q5_0, Q5_1, Q8_0, Q8_1)
Fix K-quant functions (Q2_K, Q3_K, Q4_K, Q5_K, Q6_K, Q8_K)
